arts.ttl: Revealed: The secret formula which has predicted Aston Villa's Premier League finish
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa striker and pundit Chris Sutton has revealed that he has a'secret formula' to determine how the race for the Champions League places will finish - and it has predicted that Villa face a struggle to repeat their achievement of last season. Indeed, having studied the fixtures remaining of each club between third and 11th, and working out the likeliest results based on league positions for those clubs - as well as factoring in games to be played in other competitions - Sutton has Villa to stay where they are and accrue 19 more points from their final 11 games.

arts.ttl: Lineker and Shearer Both Notice Same Thing About Marcus Rashford at Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs. Aston Villa: Unai Emery's side bidding to extend seven-season streak in Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be bidding to extend a Premier League streak to eight seasons when they square off against Crystal Palace on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace position themselves to sign 21-year-old – Eagles have to overcome competition in summer
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have identified Royal Charleroi SC’s Cheick Keita as a transfer target for the summer window. That’s according to Africa Foot, who say Crystal Palace are one of the clubs to have shown interest in the centre-back. arts.ttl: Player ‘tempted’ by Aston Villa – Villans can sign him as club ‘waiting for offers’
arts.sum: Aston Villa were serious about signing Villarreal’s Juan Foyth in the winter market. The defender initially joined the La Liga side on loan from Tottenham Hotspur in 2020 and signed for them permanently a year later. This happened when Unai Emery was in charge at the club.
